raw_text: Hi, do you have interpreter services available for a Mandarin-speaking relative attending an outpatient clinic next month? How do I arrange one?

classification.reasoning: This is a straightforward informational question about hospital services (interpreter availability and booking) for a future outpatient appointment, with no safety risk or patient dissatisfaction involved.

actions.detail: Reply drafted — enquiry is NOT covered by the knowledge base, so the draft promises a handoff instead of guessing.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for getting in touch. We want to make sure your relative's visit goes smoothly.

Unfortunately, we don't have information about interpreter services in our current knowledge base, so this part of your enquiry will be passed to our information desk for a fuller answer.

What we can share is that for outpatient clinic appointments generally, you're welcome to contact the Outpatients office directly — they may also be able to point you in the right direction:

📞 (03) 5550 0000, weekdays 8:30am – 5:00pm

Someone from our team will follow up with you shortly regarding interpreter arrangements.

actions.detail: Enquiry not answerable from KB — routed to Front-of-House / Info Desk for a human response, with a follow-up flag set. Case left open.
